name: Sticky Cats
description:
Sticky Cats is a 2 - 4 player party game, where players must steal the fish and escape out the window while sticking to everything and causing mayhem along the way.
Gamepad Controls:

Start/triangle button: Join game
Joystick: Move/aim for jumping
A or X button : Jump
Back button: Restart level
Keyboard Controls:
Enter: Join game
WASD/Arrow keys: Move/aim for jumping
Space: Jump
R: Restart level
Credits:
Jem Smith - Design and code
@jemmiwinks
Jason Sutherland - Design, art, and audio
@DriftPrism
Follow @stickycatsgame on Twitter
Please get in touch if you have any feedback, issues, or questions, and we’ll try and help.
Thanks for playing!

name: Cursed Apartment
description:
Cursed Apartment is a multiplayer and single-player horror game where you need to be attentive to not overlook any anomalies on floors. Use the elevator to reach floor 1 and escape before monsters get you. When you miss an anomaly, elevator will glitch and take you back to the highest floor.
STORY: You wake up in your apartment. A mysterious voice from a recorder tells you that you are trapped in a cursed building infested with anomalies and monsters. You need to escape by reaching floor 1.
PLAYTIME: 30 - 60 minutes

GAME MODES
Choose Exit 8 game mode - press up when there's anomaly, press down when no anomalies

Choose Escape game mode - remove anomalies by capturing them with your camera


Disclaimer: Game modes can only be chosen when creating online room. More content is available in steam version.

FEATURES
Anomalies
Deadly monsters
Multiplayer with proximity voice chat
Short loop gameplay
Translated into multiple languages

name: Zoomies Cat Racing
description:
Description
🎮 Welcome to the ultimate adrenaline-fueled gaming experience: Zoomies: Cat Racing– the purrfect fusion of speed, feline fierceness, and multiplayer mayhem! 🐾
Embark on a heart-pounding racing adventure as you immerse yourself in the captivating world of Cat Racing! Feel the thrill of the wind in your fur as you dash through various exhilarating tracks, each with its own twists, turns, and jaw-dropping surprises. 
🐱 Choose from a motley crew of feisty feline racers, each with their own unique personality and stats. From the turbo Tabby cat to the Persian powerhouse, there's a choice for every racing style!
But why settle for racing alone when you can unleash the competitive beast within? Zoomies boasts a multiplayer feature, allowing you to go whisker-to-whisker against friends!
So why wait? Follow today and see if you have what it takes to be the top cat on the track!
Features
6 wacky, unique tracks
9 unique cat breeds to race as
Cloud-Based Multiplayer
Gamepad Support
Cheat Codes
--
Multiplayer is currently ENABLED in the demo! Try it with your friends!
Zoomies has been developed using an Xbox game controller so playing with a gamepad is HIGHLY recommended!


⚠️ AI Notice⚠️
Like any craft, game development involves choosing the right tools. Alongside traditional methods, I have used AI tools to help with coding and localization. I have NOT used generative AI for art assets.

name: BOMBANANA!
description: Bạn là một đội gỡ bom gồm 3 người chơi với ba con khỉ: khỉ mù, khỉ điếc và khỉ câm. Bên trong chiếc xe tải nhỏ được cải tạo thành xưởng bom di động, bạn phải gỡ bom trước khi chúng phát nổ với thời gian và khả năng giao tiếp bị giới hạn!
